createAndMountPersistentStoragePaths.data:
declare -A mountedPaths
mkdir -p /data/users/jake/.claude
mkdir -p /home/jake/.claude

if /nix/store/xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx/bin/mount | grep -F /home/jake/.claude' ' >/dev/null; then
    if ! /nix/store/xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx/bin/mount | grep -F /home/jake/.claude' ' | grep -F bindfs; then
        if ! /nix/store/xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx/bin/mount | grep -F /home/jake/.claude' ' | grep -F /data/users/jake/.claude' ' >/dev/null; then
            # The target directory changed, so we need to remount
            echo "remounting /home/jake/.claude"
            XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=${XDG_RUNTIME_DIR:-/run/user/$(id -u)} /nix/store/xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx/bin/systemctl --user stop bindMount-data-users-jake-claude
            /nix/store/xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx/bin/bindfs -o no-allow-other,fsname=/data/users/jake/.claude /data/users/jake/.claude /home/jake/.claude
            mountedPaths[/home/jake/.claude]=1
        fi
    fi
elif /nix/store/xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx/bin/mount | grep -F /home/jake/.claude/ >/dev/null; then
    echo "Something is mounted below /home/jake/.claude, not creating bind mount to /data/users/jake/.claude" >&2
else
    /nix/store/xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx/bin/bindfs -o no-allow-other,fsname=/data/users/jake/.claude /data/users/jake/.claude /home/jake/.claude
    mountedPaths[/home/jake/.claude]=1
fi
mkdir -p /data/users/jake/.local/share/direnv
mkdir -p /home/jake/.local/share/direnv

if /nix/store/xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx/bin/mount | grep -F /home/jake/.local/share/direnv' ' >/dev/null; then
    if ! /nix/store/xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx/bin/mount | grep -F /home/jake/.local/share/direnv' ' | grep -F bindfs; then
        if ! /nix/store/xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx/bin/mount | grep -F /home/jake/.local/share/direnv' ' | grep -F /data/users/jake/.local/share/direnv' ' >/dev/null; then
            # The target directory changed, so we need to remount
            echo "remounting /home/jake/.local/share/direnv"
            XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=${XDG_RUNTIME_DIR:-/run/user/$(id -u)} /nix/store/xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx/bin/systemctl --user stop bindMount-data-users-jake-local-share-direnv
            /nix/store/xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx/bin/bindfs -o no-allow-other,fsname=/data/users/jake/.local/share/direnv /data/users/jake/.local/share/direnv /home/jake/.local/share/direnv
            mountedPaths[/home/jake/.local/share/direnv]=1
        fi
    fi
elif /nix/store/xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx/bin/mount | grep -F /home/jake/.local/share/direnv/ >/dev/null; then
    echo "Something is mounted below /home/jake/.local/share/direnv, not creating bind mount to /data/users/jake/.local/share/direnv" >&2
else
    /nix/store/xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx/bin/bindfs -o no-allow-other,fsname=/data/users/jake/.local/share/direnv /data/users/jake/.local/share/direnv /home/jake/.local/share/direnv
    mountedPaths[/home/jake/.local/share/direnv]=1
fi
